nl_query: What are the names of people who are not from Russia?
sql_query: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE Nationality != 'Russia'

nl_query: What are the details for all projects that did not hire any staff in a research role?
sql_query: SELECT project_details FROM Projects WHERE project_id NOT IN ( SELECT project_id FROM Project_Staff WHERE role_code = 'researcher' )

nl_query: Return the elimination movies of wrestlers on Team Orton.
sql_query: SELECT Elimination_Move FROM Elimination WHERE Team = 'Team Orton'

nl_query: What are the headquarters that have both a company in the banking and 'oil and gas' industries?
sql_query: SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry = 'Banking' INTERSECT SELECT headquarters FROM company WHERE main_industry = 'Oil AND gas'

nl_query: Which Annual change has a Capacity in use of 66.21%?
sql_query: SELECT Annual change FROM TABLE WHERE Capacity IN use = 66.21%

nl_query: Name the segment b for 226 episode
sql_query: SELECT Segment B FROM TABLE WHERE Episode = 226

nl_query: In which province is the 3rd largest Dehbarez?
sql_query: SELECT Province FROM TABLE WHERE 3rd Largest = dehbarez

nl_query: How many seats does the party of others have with a change of -1 and more than 0% votes?
sql_query: SELECT SUM Seats FROM TABLE WHERE Change = -1 AND Party = others AND % votes > 0

nl_query: What is the sum of the golds of the nation with 5 total and less than 0 bronze medals?
sql_query: SELECT SUM Gold FROM TABLE WHERE Total = 5 AND Bronze < 0

nl_query: Which Throws have a Position of 3b/rhp?
sql_query: SELECT Throws FROM TABLE WHERE Position = 3b/rhp

nl_query: Which Score has Points smaller than 67, and a Home of calgary flames?
sql_query: SELECT Score FROM TABLE WHERE Points < 67 AND Home = calgary flames

nl_query: How many airports do we have?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AIRPORTS

nl_query: How many distinct claim outcome codes are there?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT claim_outcome_code) FROM claims_processing

nl_query: What is the maximum capacity and the average of all stadiums ?
sql_query: SELECT MAX(capacity), average FROM stadium

nl_query: What is the number of airports per country, ordered from most to least?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) , country FROM airports GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

nl_query: What are the classes of races that have two or more corresponding races?
sql_query: SELECT CLASS FROM race GROUP BY CLASS HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

nl_query: Count the number of different film ratings.
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rating) FROM film

nl_query: Count the number of customers who are active.
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE active = '1'

nl_query: Which kind of policy type was chosen by the most customers?
sql_query: SELECT Policy_Type_Code FROM Customer_Policies GROUP BY Policy_Type_Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Count the number of captains that have each rank.
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) , rank FROM captain GROUP BY rank

nl_query: What is the p max ( bar ) for the 6876 f bolt ( kgf )?
sql_query: SELECT MIN P MAX ( bar ) FROM TABLE WHERE F bolt ( kgf ) = 6876

nl_query: What is the Pine Rivers total population after 1947 with a Redcliffe population smaller than 68,877, a total population greater than 50,785, and a Caboolture population greater than 12,207?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT (Pine Rivers) FROM TABLE WHERE Year > 1947 AND (Redcliffe) < 68,877 AND Population (Total) > 50,785 AND (Caboolture) > 12,207

nl_query: What is the birth date of the poker player with the lowest earnings?
sql_query: SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings ASC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Find the names of the trains that do not pass any station located in London.
sql_query: SELECT T2.name FROM train_station AS T1 JOIN train AS T2 ON T1.train_id = T2.train_id WHERE T1.station_id NOT IN (SELECT T4.station_id FROM train_station AS T3 JOIN station AS T4 ON T3.station_id = T4.station_id WHERE t4.location = 'London')

nl_query: Find the id, forename and number of races of all drivers who have at least participated in two races?
sql_query: SELECT T1.driverid , T1.forename , COUNT(*) FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid GROUP BY T1.driverid HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

nl_query: what is the name and age of the youngest winning pilot?
sql_query: SELECT t1.name , t1.age FROM pilot AS t1 JOIN MATCH AS t2 ON t1.pilot_id = t2.winning_pilot ORDER BY t1.age LIMIT 1

nl_query: What are the names of customers with accounts, and what are the total savings balances for each?
sql_query: SELECT SUM(T2.balance) , T1.name FROM accounts AS T1 JOIN savings AS T2 ON T1.custid = T2.custid GROUP BY T1.name

nl_query: List the medicine name and trade name which can both interact as 'inhibitor' and 'activitor' with enzymes.
sql_query: SELECT T1.name , T1.trade_name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id = T1.id WHERE interaction_type = 'inhibitor' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name , T1.trade_name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id = T1.id WHERE interaction_type = 'activitor'

nl_query: What is the most common hometown of gymnasts?
sql_query: SELECT T2.Hometown FROM gymnast AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.Gymnast_ID = T2.People_ID GROUP BY T2.Hometown ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: What are the code and description of the most frequent behavior incident type?
sql_query: SELECT T1.incident_type_code , T2.incident_type_description FROM Behavior_Incident AS T1 JOIN Ref_Incident_Type AS T2 ON T1.incident_type_code = T2.incident_type_code GROUP BY T1.incident_type_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Who has friends that are older than the average age? Print their friends and their ages as well
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name , T2.friend , T1.age FROM Person AS T1 JOIN PersonFriend AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.friend WHERE T1.age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM person)

nl_query: What is the color of the grape whose wine products has the highest average price?
sql_query: SELECT T1.Color FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape = T2.Grape GROUP BY T2.Grape ORDER BY AVG(Price) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Return the average number of weeks on top for volumes by artists that are at most 25 years old.
sql_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Weeks_on_Top) FROM artist AS T1 JOIN volume AS T2 ON T1.Artist_ID = T2.Artist_ID WHERE T1.age <= 25

nl_query: What are the names of all aicrafts that have never won any match?
sql_query: SELECT Aircraft FROM aircraft WHERE Aircraft_ID NOT IN (SELECT Winning_Aircraft FROM MATCH)

nl_query: List the names of teachers who have not been arranged to teach courses.
sql_query: SELECT Name FROM teacher WHERE Teacher_id NOT IN (SELECT Teacher_id FROM course_arrange)

nl_query: Which buildings do not have any company office? Give me the building names.
sql_query: SELECT name FROM buildings WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT building_id FROM Office_locations)

nl_query: How many routes go from the United States to Canada?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM routes WHERE dst_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country = 'Canada') AND src_apid IN (SELECT apid FROM airports WHERE country = 'United States')

nl_query: Find the number of users who did not write any review.
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM useracct WHERE u_id NOT IN (SELECT u_id FROM review)

nl_query: List the name of musicals that do not have actors.
sql_query: SELECT Name FROM musical WHERE Musical_ID NOT IN (SELECT Musical_ID FROM actor)

nl_query: List the names of people that have not been on the affirmative side of debates.
sql_query: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE People_id NOT IN (SELECT Affirmative FROM debate_people)

nl_query: List the names of the schools without any endowment.
sql_query: SELECT school_name FROM school WHERE school_id NOT IN (SELECT school_id FROM endowment)

nl_query: How many students did not have any course enrollment?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Students WHERE student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Student_Course_Enrolment)

nl_query: Which manufacturer has the most number of shops? List its name and year of opening.
sql_query: SELECT open_year , name FROM manufacturer ORDER BY num_of_shops DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: What is the name of the oldest manager?
sql_query: SELECT Name FROM manager ORDER BY Age DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Find all information about student addresses, and sort by monthly rental in descending order.
sql_query: SELECT * FROM Student_Addresses ORDER BY monthly_rental DESC

nl_query: What is the name of the winner with the most rank points who participated in the Australian Open tournament?
sql_query: SELECT winner_name FROM matches WHERE tourney_name = 'Australian Open' ORDER BY winner_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: What are the first names for all faculty professors, ordered by first name?
sql_query: SELECT Fname FROM FACULTY WHERE Rank = 'Professor' ORDER BY Fname

nl_query: Find the name of the most expensive product.
sql_query: SELECT product_name FROM products ORDER BY product_price DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: List the locations of schools in ascending order of enrollment.
sql_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM school ORDER BY Enrollment ASC

nl_query: List the first and last name of all players who are left / L hand in the order of birth date.
sql_query: SELECT first_name , last_name FROM players WHERE hand = 'L' ORDER BY birth_date

nl_query: What is the desired rate when the rate limit (p) is 50.33?
sql_query: SELECT Desired rate (p) FROM TABLE WHERE Rate LIMIT (p) = 50.33

nl_query: What is the rate limit when the desired rate change (%) is +40.4?
sql_query: SELECT Rate LIMIT (p) FROM TABLE WHERE Desired rate change (%) = +40.4

nl_query: What is the rate change % when the rate limit is 82.86?
sql_query: SELECT Rate change (%) FROM TABLE WHERE Rate LIMIT (p) = 82.86

nl_query: What are the ids of the faculty members who do not advise any student.
sql_query: SELECT FacID FROM Faculty EXCEPT SELECT advisor FROM Student

nl_query: Find the first names that are used for professionals or owners but are not used as dog names.
sql_query: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals UNION SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT name FROM Dogs

nl_query: What are the distinct visit dates?
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT Visit_Date FROM VISITS

nl_query: Find the names of all the product characteristics.
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT characteristic_name FROM CHARACTERISTICS

nl_query: What are the distinct Famous release dates?
sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT(Famous_Release_date) FROM artist

nl_query: What are the title and issues of the books?
sql_query: SELECT Title , Issues FROM book

nl_query: what is the minimum rockhampton
sql_query: SELECT MIN Rockhampton FROM TABLE

nl_query: What is the highest number listed?
sql_query: SELECT MAX Number FROM TABLE

nl_query: What was the largest attended game?
sql_query: SELECT MAX Attendance FROM TABLE

nl_query: What is the lowest season?
sql_query: SELECT MIN Season FROM TABLE

nl_query: What are the names(namesakes) through out the entire chart?
sql_query: SELECT Name (Namesake) FROM TABLE
